headlines.title: Iran war live: Qatar’s PM meets US envoys, Tehran holds firm on conditions
headlines.snippet: Iran states that negotiations for a final agreement will not commence until hostilities cease in Lebanon and frozen Iranian funds are released by the US.

headlines.title: ‘A rally like none other’: Trump unveils 2026 Republican midterm convention
headlines.snippet: The Republican Party is aiming to maintain control of both chambers of Congress in the upcoming US midterm elections scheduled for November.

headlines.title: Donald Trump reports $1.4bn in cryptocurrency income in government filing
headlines.snippet: Donald Trump has reported earnings of $1.4 billion in cryptocurrency for a government filing. He has introduced several crypto-friendly policies since beginning his second term in the White House.

headlines.title: Venezuelans the US deported hours before earthquakes still missing
headlines.snippet: Venezuelans who were deported by the US mere hours before two devastating earthquakes struck last Wednesday remain missing.

headlines.title: “WhatsApp Privacy Changes”
headlines.snippet: WhatsApp is introducing usernames to enhance user privacy by protecting phone numbers.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Gaza security force says tactical vehicles have arrived near Strip
headlines.snippet: A Gaza security force, backed by Trump, has received tactical vehicles near the Strip. The Board of Peace, a group associated with Trump, has stated these vehicles are for the International Security Force, a multinational deployment in the region.

headlines.title: Israel delays withdrawal from two southern Lebanon villages, report says
headlines.snippet: Israel's withdrawal from two villages in southern Lebanon has been postponed. This delay is pending an agreement on a US oversight mechanism, according to Israeli officials.

headlines.title: Israeli forces order closure of Nablus charity for one year
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces have ordered the closure of the al-Tadamon Charitable Society in Nablus, located in the occupied West Bank, for a period of one year. The society's headquarters were raided by military vehicles.

headlines.title: Syria's president condemns Israeli attacks near Golan Heights
headlines.snippet: Syria's President Ahmed al-Sharaa has condemned Israeli attacks near the occupied Golan Heights, calling them incursions and a violation of Syria's sovereignty. Residents near the Golan Heights were forced to flee their homes.

headlines.title: US and Gulf states sanction entities accused of financial links to Hezbollah
headlines.snippet: The US and Gulf states have jointly sanctioned five entities and sixteen individuals accused of financial links to Hezbollah. These actions target the Al-Qard al-Hasan Association, which the Treasury alleges operates as a non-governmental organization.

headlines.title: Vance Says ‘More Game to Play’ in Iran Negotiations
headlines.snippet: Al Arabiya English reports that Vance believes there is "more game to play" in the ongoing negotiations with Iran.

headlines.title: Venezuela quake deaths rise to 1,943, lawmaker says
headlines.snippet: According to Al Arabiya English, the death toll from the earthquakes in Venezuela has risen to 1,943, as reported by a lawmaker.

headlines.title: Can Lebanon Really Disarm Hezbollah?
headlines.snippet: Al Arabiya English discusses the question of whether Lebanon can effectively disarm Hezbollah.

headlines.title: Israeli fighter jets scrambled after airliner accidentally reports hijacking
headlines.snippet: Al Arabiya English reports that Israeli fighter jets were scrambled after an airliner mistakenly reported a hijacking.

headlines.title: In south Lebanon, Netanyahu says Israel will stay as long as Hezbollah ‘threatens us’
headlines.snippet: In southern Lebanon, Netanyahu stated that Israel will remain as long as Hezbollah poses a threat.

headlines.title: Syrian parliament set to announce Sharaa's pick of 70 MPs
headlines.snippet: The Syrian parliament is preparing to announce the selection of 70 Members of Parliament, after which the new legislature will commence debating and approving legislation.

headlines.title: Man arrested after arson attack on Dublin Islamic centre
headlines.snippet: A man has been arrested following an arson attack on an Islamic center in Dublin. The incident occurred after evening prayers, and no injuries were reported.

headlines.title: US Supreme Court rejects Trump bid to end birthright citizenship
headlines.snippet: The US Supreme Court has rejected Donald Trump's attempt to end birthright citizenship. Chief Justice John Roberts affirmed that individuals born in the US are citizens at birth.

headlines.title: Iran prepares for late supreme leader's funeral later this week
headlines.snippet: Iran is preparing for the funeral of its late supreme leader, Ayatollah Khamenei, later this week. Representatives from approximately 30 countries are expected to attend.

headlines.title: Fresh Israeli strikes on Gaza set 200 tents ablaze despite truce
headlines.snippet: Fresh Israeli strikes in Gaza have ignited approximately 200 tents, despite a reported ceasefire. These strikes have left thousands of people displaced and without shelter.

headlines.snippet: According to almayadeen.net, Baqaei stated that there have been no meetings with American officials and that Iran adheres to a "step-by-step" principle regarding its engagements.

headlines.title: Doha talks will center on MoU, no separate meeting with US on agenda, says Baqaei
headlines.snippet: Tehran, IRNA reports that Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei rejected claims of a planned meeting between Iranian and American delegations in Doha, Qatar. He stated that discussions would focus on implementing the Islamabad MoU.

headlines.title: More than half of social media child safety features aren’t working as advertised, new research finds
